results.content:
### Standout features

## Locofy.ai

Locofy.ai

Build frontend 10x faster with design-to-code AI

### Best for

Best for Figma-first teams that want to convert designs into maintainable code quickly.

### Standout features

## Magic Patterns

Magic Patterns

Design your product ideas with AI.

### Best for

Ideal for PMs and product teams who need fast, design-system-consistent interactive prototypes.

### Standout features

## Uizard

Uizard

App, web, & UI design made easy - powered by AI

### Best for

Best for non-designers who need fast UI concepts to align stakeholders and hand off to Figma.

### Standout features
